title: Rhonda Denton
compiled_truth: Rhonda Denton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-26 to 2001-06-14), Rhonda Denton sent 161 and received 555 emails, totalling 716 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kate Symes](people/kate-symes) (103), [Genia Fitzgerald](people/genia-fitzgerald) (79), [Leslie Hansen](people/leslie-hansen) (72), [Christian Yoder](people/christian-yoder) (69), [Edward Sacks](people/edward-sacks) (69).
